page.title: Template:Disestablishment category in country by decade

revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Disestablishment category in country by decade]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Disestablishment category in country by decade]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

<includeonly><!-- # The first step is to check whether this is being used on a YYY0s disestablishments in [Country] category -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{FULLPAGENAME}}|pattern=^Category:%d?%d?%d?0s disestablishments in .+$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%<!-- -->|<!-- # We are NOT on a valid page # So raise an error -->{{error|ERROR! {{t|Disestablishment category in country by decade}} is for use only in a category of the name "YYY0s disestablishments in [Country]".}}<!-- -->[[Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates|Disestablishment category in country by decade]]<!-- -->|<!-- # We are on a valid page # So invoke the core -->{{Disestablishment category in country by decade/core | decade = {{{decade|{{Title decade}}}}} <!-- allow decade param for demonstration purposes --> | country = {{{1|}}} | sortkey = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}} | nocat={{{nocat|}}} | dab={{{dab|{{{1|}}}}}} }}<!-- -->}}<!-- # Check for unknown parameters is primarily to catch the # pre-August 2024 syntax which took years as parameters # (e.g. {{Disestablishment category in country by decade|20|1|21st|Zimbabwe}}), # but also has the positive side effect of catching other errors -->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|1|2|nocat|decade|dab|unknown=<!-- # We have unknown parameters # So issue a warning and categorize it appropriately -->ERROR! Unexpected parameter "_VALUE_" in {{t|Disestablishment category in country by decade}}<!-- -->{{Category other|[[Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates|Disestablishment category in country by decade]]}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><!-- # Note {{Automatic category TOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded -->{{Automatic category TOC}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here! --></noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <includeonly><!-- # The first step is to check whether this is being used on a YYY0s disestablishments in [Country] category -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{FULLPAGENAME}}|pattern=^Category:%d?%d?%d?0s disestablishments in .+$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%<!-- -->|<!-- # We are NOT on a valid page # So raise an error -->{{error|ERROR! {{t|Disestablishment category in country by decade}} is for use only in a category of the name "YYY0s disestablishments in [Country]".}}<!-- -->[[Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates|Disestablishment category in country by decade]]<!-- -->|<!-- # We are on a valid page # So invoke the core -->{{Disestablishment category in country by decade/core | decade = {{{decade|{{Title decade}}}}} <!-- allow decade param for demonstration purposes --> | country = {{{1|}}} | sortkey = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}} | nocat={{{nocat|}}} | dab={{{dab|{{{1|}}}}}} }}<!-- -->}}<!-- # Check for unknown parameters is primarily to catch the # pre-August 2024 syntax which took years as parameters # (e.g. {{Disestablishment category in country by decade|20|1|21st|Zimbabwe}}), # but also has the positive side effect of catching other errors -->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|1|2|nocat|decade|dab|unknown=<!-- # We have unknown parameters # So issue a warning and categorize it appropriately -->ERROR! Unexpected parameter "_VALUE_" in {{t|Disestablishment category in country by decade}}<!-- -->{{Category other|[[Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates|Disestablishment category in country by decade]]}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><!-- # Note {{Automatic category TOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded -->{{Automatic category TOC}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here! --></noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]

Unexpected parameter "_VALUE_" in {{t|Disestablishment category in country by decade}}<!-- -->{{Category other|}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><!-- # Note {{Automatic category TOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded -->{{Automatic category TOC}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here! --></noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates|Disestablishment category in country by decade]] [[Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates|Disestablishment category in country by decade]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly><!-- # The first step is to check whether this is being used on a YYY0s disestablishments in [Country] category -->{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{FULLPAGENAME}}|pattern=^Category:%d?%d?%d?0s disestablishments in .+$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%<!-- -->|<!-- # We are NOT on a valid page # So raise an error -->{{error|ERROR! {{t|Disestablishment category in country by decade}} is for use only in a category of the name "YYY0s disestablishments in [Country]".}}<!-- --><!-- -->|<!-- # We are on a valid page # So invoke the core -->{{Disestablishment category in country by decade/core | decade = {{{decade|{{Title decade}}}}} <!-- allow decade param for demonstration purposes --> | country = {{{1|}}} | sortkey = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}} | nocat={{{nocat|}}} | dab={{{dab|{{{1|}}}}}} }}<!-- -->}}<!-- # Check for unknown parameters is primarily to catch the # pre-August 2024 syntax which took years as parameters # (e.g. {{Disestablishment category in country by decade|20|1|21st|Zimbabwe}}), # but also has the positive side effect of catching other errors -->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|1|2|nocat|decade|dab|unknown=<!-- # We have unknown parameters # So issue a warning and categorize it appropriately -->ERROR! Unexpected parameter "_VALUE_" in {{t|Disestablishment category in country by decade}}<!-- -->{{Category other|}}<!-- -->}}</includeonly><!-- # Note {{Automatic category TOC}} needs to be available whether or not this template page has been transcluded -->{{Automatic category TOC}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, please, not here! --> [[Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates|Disestablishment category in country by decade]] [[Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates|Disestablishment category in country by decade]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disestablishment_category_in_country_by_decade for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{FULLPAGENAME}}|pattern=^Category:%d?%d?%d?0s disestablishments in .+$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{error|ERROR! {{t|Disestablishment category in country by decade}} is for use only in a category of the name "YYY0s disestablishments in [Country]".}}|{{Disestablishment category in country by decade/core
            | decade = {{{decade|{{Title decade}}}}} 
            | country = {{{1|}}}
            | sortkey = {{{2|{{{1|}}}}}}
            | nocat={{{nocat|}}}
            | dab={{{dab|{{{1|}}}}}}
          }}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|1|2|nocat|decade|dab|unknown=ERROR! Unexpected parameter "_VALUE_" in {{t|Disestablishment category in country by decade}}{{Category other|}}}}</includeonly>{{Automatic category TOC}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates|Disestablishment category in country by decade]]
[[Category:Errors reported by establishment and disestablishment templates|Disestablishment category in country by decade]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
